description.unified: Throws a spear at the furthest enemy, dealing Physical Damage and drawing the enemy in front of the hero. Then deals Physical Damage to enemies in range, stunning them for 3 sec.

Upon blocking enemy attack for [7 sec->15 sec], triggers a shockwave that deals Physical Damage to enemies in range, reducing their ATK by [25%->20%]. [(removed) your Physical Block Chance is increased by 200]

Upon DMG block during casting, jump attack DMG is increased by 7%. Also, deals Physical Damage to enemy and inflicts stun [0.4 sec->(removed)]. After casting, jumps and attacks the enemy, dealing Physical Damage and stunning them for [2.5 sec.->4 sec.] Gains immunity to CC while the skill is in use. [(removed) all allies’ Physical Damage taken is reduced by 20%, prepare to leap for 5 sec]
All allies' Physical Defense and P.Block chance is increased by 250.

IV.unified: Stun duration is increased by [1.2 sec.->2 sec.]

light.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, pull in 2 enemies.

dark.unified: All pulled enemies take [30%->25%] increased DMG from all sources for [5 sec->10 sec].

light.unified: Deals extra P.DMG based on P.DEF.

dark.unified: Ally P.DEF is boosted by [24%->20%] for [7 sec->10 sec] after activation.
While casting, all allies take 20% reduced P.DMG.

light.unified: P.DEF is increased by [30%->20%] and P. Block is boosted by [75->50%].

dark.unified: Recovers HP equal to 40% of P.DEF upon blocking.

description.unified: [Will to Win] Increases DMG by 50% and P.Weakness of the target by {0}% for [5 sec->10 sec].
[Steel Fortress] Mana cost is reduced by 1 and jump attack's Stun duration is increased by {0} sec.
[Spearhead] Increases DEF boost by 50%. All allies have their P.Crit Resistance increased by {0}.

dark.unified: At the beginning of every battle, decrease the ATK of all enemies by [25%->20%] for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Increases P.DEF of all allies by {0}%. Blocking an enemy attack has a {1}% chance to recover {2}% Mana and reduce Cooldown of all skills by 1 sec.
